productTitle: MikroTik Wireless Wire Cube Pro – 60 GHz Point-to-Point Gigabit+ Link
name: MikroTik Wireless Wire Cube Pro
title: MikroTik Wireless Wire Cube Pro
title_extended: MikroTik Wireless Wire Cube Pro – 60 GHz Point-to-Point Gigabit+ Link
short_description: 60 GHz 802.11ay, Gigabit Ethernet, Powerful quad-core CPU, 5 GHz failover, TDMA GPS sync
description: 60 GHz 802.11ay, Gigabit Ethernet, Powerful quad-core CPU, 5 GHz failover, TDMA GPS sync

detailed_description.heading: Unleashing 60 GHz Advancements
detailed_description.text: Experience advanced wireless connectivity with the Wireless Wire Cube Pro, leveraging the cutting-edge capabilities of the latest Cube 60Pro series. Embracing the 802.11ay standard, this device redefines the boundaries of wireless communication, offering higher distances, enhanced stability, unmatched speed, and unparalleled convenience.

The Wireless Wire Cube Pro excels in establishing ultra-fast point-to-point connections. This feature is particularly advantageous for scenarios where high-speed, direct connections between two points are essential, delivering swift and reliable data transmission. With the capability to establish connections over distances of up to 1 km, the Wireless Wire Cube Pro unlocks new possibilities in bridging locations. This is especially valuable in scenarios where traditional networking infrastructure is impractical or cost-prohibitive. Furthermore, the Wireless Wire Cube Pro goes beyond expectations by maintaining reliable connections even over impressive distances of 2.4 km.

The Wireless Wire Cube Pro's advanced features and exceptional capabilities open up a spectrum of versatile use cases. Whether deployed in urban environments, remote locations, or expansive industrial settings, the device excels in providing reliable, high-speed connectivity. Its ability to cover extensive distances makes it a preferred choice for scenarios where conventional networking solutions fall short.

detailed_description.heading: Failover Redefined
detailed_description.text: While the 60 GHz frequency guarantees remarkable speed and capacity, these devices go the extra mile by incorporating an automatic 5 GHz failover. This feature ensures uninterrupted connectivity, even in challenging scenarios. To further fortify performance, the Cube 60Pro devices are equipped with a potent directional antenna, maintaining robust connections in both the 5 GHz and 60 GHz bands. This proves especially valuable during adverse weather conditions, where the directional antenna ensures consistent and reliable performance.

Enhanced with a robust metal base, this design not only ensures durability but also opens up a realm of possibilities with improved mounting options and efficient cooling mechanisms. The Cube stands as a testament to longevity and optimal performance in a variety of environments.

detailed_description.heading: Cutting-Edge Specifications
detailed_description.text: The Cube Pro stands for speed and reliability, ensuring seamless operations even in demanding networking environments. With its robust specifications, including a formidable IPQ-4019 chipset, a potent quad-core processor and ample RAM, this device is poised to deliver an unparalleled user experience. Equipped with 64 MB of storage memory, the Cube Pro handles current demands with ease; and, coupled with the advanced processor, ensures that data processing remains swift and responsive. With a maximum power draw of 13 W, this device minimizes energy consumption while maximizing operational capabilities.

The Cube Pro's Ethernet port, boasting a capacity of 1 Gbps, unlocks the full potential of your network's bandwidth. The device ensures that data flows seamlessly, eliminating bottlenecks and delivering a networking experience that aligns with the demands of modern connectivity.
